input.testCaseTitle: After creating the product,By default PMG code is not showing.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-180 reported defect: After creating the product,By default PMG code is not showing.
input.errorMessage: After creating the product,By default PMG code is not showing.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Newly created products did not default-populate the PMG code. The expected PMG classification value was missing from the created product view until the fix was verified.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.72. code-bug is acceptable because the defect may be in default-value binding logic.
